SEARCH
Module com.example.simul2d
Package com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold

Class Mold

java.lang.Object
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Entity
com.example.simul2d.Entities.Mold.Mold
All Implemented Interfaces:
CanAge, CanGrow, CanPropagate, Displayable, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AxialMold, CircularMold, ProximalMold
public abstract class Mold extends Entity implements CanGrow, CanPropagate, Displayable, CanAge
Abstract base class for mold entities used in the simulation.

This class centralizes common state and behavior shared by concrete mold implementations (for example AxialMold, CircularMold, and DividedMold1). It implements several domain traits such as CanGrow, CanPropagate and CanAge and exposes properties used by the simulation systems (growth, propagation probability, age-based death).

Subclasses may override growth, propagation and string representation methods to provide variant-specific behavior and display characters.

See Also:

  • Field Details

    • MAX_GROWTH

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Mold

      public Mold(int growth, int growthRate, int minGrowthValueToPropagate, double PropagationProbability, Entities entityType, double ageDeathFactor, double ageDeathMax)
      Constructs a Mold with the supplied initial growth and growth rate.
      Parameters:
      growth - initial growth value (units)
      growthRate - growth added per simulation step (units)
      minGrowthValueToPropagate - minimum local growth required to allow propagation
      PropagationProbability - probability of successful propagation (0.0 - 1.0)
      entityType - the Entities enum value identifying the mold type
      ageDeathFactor - factor controlling how fast age increases instantaneous death probability
      ageDeathMax - maximum instantaneous death probability due to age (0.0 - 1.0)

  • Method Details

    • isDead

      public boolean isDead()
      Specified by:
      isDead in interface CanAge
      Returns:
      whether the entity is currently dead.

    • ageOneStep

      public boolean ageOneStep()
      Performs one aging step and possibly marks the entity as dead.

      The method increases the internal age counter and computes an instantaneous death probability using an exponential-like law bounded by ageDeathMax. If a random draw falls below that probability the entity is marked dead and the method returns true.

      Specified by:
      ageOneStep in interface CanAge
      Returns:
      true if the entity died during this aging step

    • getAge

      public int getAge()
      Returns:
      the age (number of steps) since this entity was created

    • getGrowth

      public int getGrowth()
      Overrides:
      getGrowth in class Entity
      Returns:
      the growth units currently stored on this entity

    • setGrowth

      public void setGrowth(int growth)
      Sets the current growth value for this entity.
      Overrides:
      setGrowth in class Entity
      Parameters:
      growth - new growth value (callers should ensure the value is within valid bounds)

    • getGrowthRate

      public int getGrowthRate()
      Specified by:
      getGrowthRate in interface CanGrow
      Returns:
      growth units added per step

    • setGrowthRate

      public void setGrowthRate(int growthRate)
      Sets the growth rate used for subsequent growth steps.
      Specified by:
      setGrowthRate in interface CanGrow
      Parameters:
      growthRate - growth units per simulation step

    • getPropagationProbability

      public double getPropagationProbability()
      Specified by:
      getPropagationProbability in interface CanPropagate
      Returns:
      probability in range [0.0, 1.0]

    • grow

      public int grow(int totalGrowthOnCell)
      Default per-step growth implementation.

      This method increases this entity's growth by growthRate unless doing so would exceed the per-cell capacity (100) or the entity's own maximum. The method returns the actual growth units added which may be smaller than growthRate when capped.

      Specified by:
      grow in interface CanGrow
      Parameters:
      totalGrowthOnCell - the aggregated growth already present in the containing cell
      Returns:
      the number of growth units actually added during this step

    • getDisplaySize

      public double getDisplaySize()
      Specified by:
      getDisplaySize in interface Displayable
      Returns:
      the display size used for rendering order (larger = drawn on top).

    • getOpacity

      public double getOpacity()
      Specified by:
      getOpacity in interface Displayable
      Returns:
      the opacity in range [0.0, 1.0].

    • isAbleToGrow

      public boolean isAbleToGrow(int totalGrowthOnCell)
      Determines if this mold is able to grow based on its growth rate and the current growth conditions of the containing cell.

      Growth is possible if the growth rate is positive, the total growth on the cell has not reached a global limit (100), and this mold has not already reached its maximum growth (100).

      Specified by:
      isAbleToGrow in interface CanGrow
      Parameters:
      totalGrowthOnCell - aggregated growth value for the containing cell
      Returns:
      true if growth is possible under current conditions, false otherwise

    • isAbleToPropagate

      public boolean isAbleToPropagate()
      Determines if this mold is able to propagate based on its current growth.

      Propagation is possible if the mold's growth has reached or exceeded the configured minimum growth value required for propagation.

      Specified by:
      isAbleToPropagate in interface CanPropagate
      Returns:
      true if propagation is possible, false otherwise

    • resetGrowth

      public void resetGrowth()
      Resets the growth back to zero.
